scripts.build: pnpm run build:vite && tsx scripts/build-manifests.ts --target all
scripts.build:chrome: pnpm run build:vite && tsx scripts/build-manifests.ts --target chrome
scripts.build:firefox-desktop: pnpm run build:vite && tsx scripts/build-manifests.ts --target firefox-desktop
scripts.build:firefox-android: pnpm run build:vite && tsx scripts/build-manifests.ts --target firefox-android
scripts.package:chrome: pnpm run build:chrome && zip -r dist/chrome.zip dist/chrome/
scripts.package:firefox-desktop: pnpm run build:firefox-desktop && zip -r dist/firefox-desktop.zip dist/firefox-desktop/
scripts.package:firefox-android: pnpm run build:firefox-android && zip -r dist/firefox-android.zip dist/firefox-android/
